title: Local Privilege Escalation in Splunk Enterprise for Windows through Python Module Search Path
description: Local Privilege Escalation in Splunk Enterprise for Windows through Python Module Search Path
solution:
Upgrade Splunk Enterprise to versions 10.2.0, 10.0.3, 9.4.8, 9.3.9 or higher.
